mcq.question: What is an embedded system?
mcq.correct: A computer system built into another device to perform a specific function
wrong: A general-purpose computer used for many tasks
A system designed to store large amounts of data
A device used mainly for user interaction

mcq.question: What is meant by a dedicated function?
wrong: A task that changes every day

mcq.question: Which of these is an example of an embedded system?
wrong: A computer used for office work
A laptop used for multiple applications
A tablet used for general tasks

mcq.question: How is an embedded system different from a general-purpose computer?
mcq.correct: It is designed for one main task
wrong: It is designed to run many different programs
It always has more processing power
It is mainly used for user interaction

mcq.question: What is firmware?
wrong: A program downloaded from the internet

mcq.question: What is a microcontroller?
mcq.correct: A single microprocessor system including CPU, RAM and ROM used to control a device
wrong: A component used only for graphics processing
A storage device used for saving data
A device used to connect networks together
